data.name: Mechaneer Resta's Grand Adventure
data.detailed_description:
Resta lives happily as an inventor in a small city.

But her normal life is shattered when the robots around town go berserk and begin wrecking everything in sight.

It's up to Resta and her good friend Curie to uncover the truth behind the incident and put an end to the chaos!

Navigate through the side-scrolling maps and defeat your enemies with your trusty gun! There are all kinds of enemies with a wide range of attack patterns, so tread carefully!

Exciting Boss Fights

Each level contains a unique boss fight to challenge your skills!

Variety of Weapons

There are a number of weapons to unlock, each with its own functionality. Collect them all!

Engaging Story

Discover the truth behind the robot incident as well as Frezero's real motives!
data.about_the_game:
Resta lives happily as an inventor in a small city.

But her normal life is shattered when the robots around town go berserk and begin wrecking everything in sight.

It's up to Resta and her good friend Curie to uncover the truth behind the incident and put an end to the chaos!

Navigate through the side-scrolling maps and defeat your enemies with your trusty gun! There are all kinds of enemies with a wide range of attack patterns, so tread carefully!

Exciting Boss Fights

Each level contains a unique boss fight to challenge your skills!

Variety of Weapons

There are a number of weapons to unlock, each with its own functionality. Collect them all!

Engaging Story

Discover the truth behind the robot incident as well as Frezero's real motives!
data.short_description: One day, the robots around town go out of control and start running amok. It's up to Resta and her good friend Curie to identify the source of the disturbance and save everyone!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
